title: Smart Cart Sync
desc: Real-time sync across all your sessions. Add on mobile, checkout on desktop — seamlessly.

title: Multi-Device Cart
desc: Your cart follows you everywhere. Log in from any device and pick up right where you left off.

title: AI Suggestions
desc: Our neural engine learns your taste and recommends what you'll actually love — not just what's trending.

title: Budget Tracking
desc: Set spending limits, get real-time alerts and visual breakdowns. Shop smart, never overspend.
